ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOORE, SHARON AS TO DEFENDANT MCDONALD, BOB IND/DBA MONOR HOUSE PAVILION
DEFT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE ON OEX HEARING, FILED. TO BE CONSIDERED ON HEARING DATE.
CONTC ORDER REQUEST BY PLTFF FILED(VIA MAIL).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOORE, SHARON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCDONALD, BOB IND/DBA MONOR HOUSE PAVILION $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,052.00, THE CONTRACT BETWEEN PLTF & DEFT IS RESCINDED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-07-2008 IS CONTINUED TO FEB-14-2008 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PER CCOURT ORDER. PARTIES TO DISCUSS METHODS FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGEMENT. IF NO APPEARANCES ON 2/14/08. OEX DISCHARGED.
